data.body:
Epic completion evidence (all 6 child stories closed+signed; Gerrit changes 687/688/692/693/695/698 each LLM-Review+1 & Verified+1):
- AC 'all child stories closed': 4e19,7c84,e7e0,fde0,46f0,a3db all closed with completion-verifier attestations.
- AC 'v2 sidecar full four-pass incl pass-4 coaching, all buckets': plan v2 (4e19) — tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py::test_review_run_emits_lossless_v2_sidecar_via_real_emit_path drives a REAL review -> real emit -> asserts emitted JSON schema=plan_review_result_v2 with per-finding evidence/scenarios/block_threshold/blocking_enabled; code v2 pools blocking/advisory/dropped/indeterminate each w/ verification+pass3+threshold (7c84, test_audit_code_review_v2.py); pass-4 coaching now persisted losslessly {move_id,move_name,subject,finding_refs,coaching} in plan sidecar and verbatim in code sidecar (a3db, test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py).
- AC 'completion PASS per-criterion record': e7e0 — criteria[] on CompletionVerdict + completion_verifier_pass_v1 sidecar; tests/unit/test_audit_completion_v2.py + tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py::test_pass_close_persists_criteria_record.
- AC 'audit read layer full history + relates_to': 46f0 — rebar.audit.read.audit_trail + CLI 'rebar audit show' + MCP audit_trail; tests/unit/test_audit_read.py (aggregate + bare + enumerator + CLI subprocess + MCP).
- AC 'make lint && typecheck && test pass': all six changes carry Gerrit Verified=+1 (clean-env CI); local make lint/typecheck green.
